name: goldmine-saas
description: Goldmine SaaS Static Frontend Build for Netlify

scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('dist')) fs.mkdirSync('dist'); fs.copyFileSync('templates/index.html', 'dist/index.html'); fs.copyFileSync('templates/app.html', 'dist/dashboard.html'); console.log('Static frontend build completed successfully in dist/ (index.html, dashboard.html)');"
